name: portalflow hello-world (OpenClaw skill demo)
description: Minimal automation an agent can run end-to-end after discovering portalflow via the OpenClaw skill. Navigates to example.com, captures the page title, and saves a simplified DOM snapshot. Designed to exercise every part of the agent surface (--json, --html-dir, schema discovery) in under 10 seconds.
goal: Demonstrate a complete portalflow run that an agent can execute and parse without human intervention.

steps.name: Save simplified DOM
steps.description: Writes a YAML simplification of the current DOM to <htmlDir>/page_dom.yaml and registers it as a run artifact.
